description: Migration: accounting_sync_cycles table (cycle_id, tenant, adapter_type, target_realm, status, started_at, finished_at, cursor_before, cursor_after, stats jsonb, error), Citus-distributed on tenant like accounting_export_* tables.

Migration: accounting_sync_operations table (op_id, tenant, adapter_type, target_realm, operation, alga_entity_type, alga_entity_id, status pending|in_progress|done|failed|skipped, attempts, last_error, payload jsonb, created_at, processed_at), Citus-distributed on tenant.
Migration: accounting_export_batches.origin column ('manual' default | 'scheduled') so scheduled auto-batches are distinguishable in the existing exports UI.
Per-tenant auto-sync setting (storage + read/write accessors + server action), default OFF; toggled from the settings health panel. Gated EE + billing_settings update.
QuickBooksOnlineAdapter.deliver snapshots the exported total in mapping metadata alongside the existing sync token (drift baseline).
AccountingExportAdapterCapabilities extended with supportsChangePolling and supportsPaymentRecording; QBO adapter declares both true, CSV/Xero adapters false.

QboClientService.fetchChanges(since): ChangeDataCapture call for Customer, Payment, Invoice, CreditMemo returning a normalized change set (entity type, id, sync token, deleted flag, payload), handling CDC pagination.

AccountingSyncCycleService: orchestrates one cycle per tenant×realm in order token-health → inbound (customers, payments, invoice drift) → outbound drain → cursor advance; writes accounting_sync_cycles row with stats (payments applied/skipped, drift found, ops drained/failed, unmapped ignored).
Cursor management: poll from last successful cursor_after minus 5-minute overlap; cursor advances only when inbound application succeeds; outbound failures never block the cursor.
Ops queue repository: enqueue with dedupe (one pending op per entity+operation), claim/in_progress, complete, fail with attempts increment and capped retries (cap → status skipped + exception).

Job scheduling: accounting-sync-cycle registered through IJobRunner every 15 minutes, singleton-keyed per tenant×realm; registered on OAuth connect, deregistered on disconnect, re-registered for connected tenants at startup. Must not fall into JobScheduler's 24h interval coercion (use short-interval path or fix coercion).
Sync-now server action (EE + billing_settings update gated) triggering an immediate cycle for the tenant's realm; used by settings panel and invoice detail.
Cycle guard: cycle exits cleanly (no-op, no cursor burn) when tenant is CE, disconnected, or auto-sync prerequisites are missing; defensively deregisters orphaned schedules.

recordExternalPayment shared service extracted from PaymentService.recordPaymentFromWebhook (EE), provider-parameterized (stripe|quickbooks); Stripe webhook path refactored onto it with byte-identical behavior.
computeBalanceDue helper (total_amount − credit_applied − payments) used for status flips; initially equivalent to current behavior (slice 2 swaps internals for the credit reshape).

Payment applier: per-allocation application from QBO Payment.Line[].LinkedTxn — resolve invoice via mapping ledger, insert invoice_payments (method 'quickbooks', reference = QBO payment number), write payment transaction with {qbo_payment_id, realm} metadata, flip status paid/partially_applied via computeBalanceDue.
Payment mapping rows (alga_entity_type 'invoice_payment', external id = QBO Payment id, metadata: sync token + allocations snapshot) providing inbound idempotency and echo suppression.
Payment edit handling: CDC payment with moved sync token is transactionally reversed and reapplied from its current allocations.
Payment delete handling: CDC-deleted payment writes payment_reversal transactions, removes/voids the invoice_payments rows, recomputes invoice status.
Inbound payment exceptions: allocation against an unmapped QBO invoice → accounting_sync_unmapped_payment exception; payment/invoice currency mismatch → exception; neither applies anything.
Unapplied/overpayment remainders and RefundReceipts are recorded in cycle stats only — never applied, never imported.

Customer change applier: QBO renames refresh the mapping's cached display name; mapped customer deleted/merged/inactive in QBO → exception (customer re-link UI arrives in slice 3; exception links to mappings tab).

Drift comparator: for mapped invoices with moved sync token, compare exported-total snapshot, void/delete state, and doc number; balance-only movement is not drift; unmapped QBO invoices counted in stats only.
Material drift sets mapping sync_status 'drift' and files an accounting_sync_drift exception carrying both versions (Alga snapshot vs QBO current).
Drift resolution — re-export: sparse-update QBO back to Alga's truth, refresh snapshot/sync token, clear drift status and close the exception.
Drift resolution — accept: refresh the mapping snapshot to QBO's current values (acknowledgment, no Alga document change), clear drift status and close the exception.
QBO-side void/delete of a mapped invoice: mapping enters an external-voided state surfaced as drift exception; badge renders the voided state.
finalizeInvoice producer hook: enqueue export_invoice when a realm is connected and tenant auto-sync is on (EE-gated, no-op otherwise).

Outbound drain: pending export_invoice ops grouped into one auto-created batch (origin 'scheduled') per cycle, run through the existing validate→transform→deliver pipeline; ops marked done/failed from batch results.
Scheduled-batch validation failures (missing mappings etc.) create accounting_sync_export_error exceptions instead of remaining silent batch errors.
Manual batch creation marks matching pending export_invoice ops done so manual and scheduled paths never double-export.

Migration: system task definitions + forms for accounting_sync_drift, accounting_sync_unmapped_payment, accounting_sync_export_error, accounting_connection_expired; supersedes/folds the unwired qbo_mapping_error type.
Exception service: create-or-update with dedupe — one open workflow task per entity+type; subsequent cycles update context instead of filing duplicates; resolution closes the task.

Connection-failure handling: hard auth failure marks the connection expired, files accounting_connection_expired exception, notifies billing admins immediately (internal + email), aborts cycle without advancing cursor.
Token-expiry countdown: cycle checks refresh-token expiry and notifies billing admins once per 14/7/2-day threshold.
Per-cycle summary notification fired only when new exceptions appeared in that cycle ('N new QBO sync exceptions').
Per-invoice sync status read action: aggregates mapping ledger + pending ops into Not synced | Queued | Synced | Drift | Error | Voided; batched variant for list views.
InvoiceSyncBadge component (InvoiceTaxSourceBadge pattern): state badge + tooltip with QBO doc number, last-synced time, and environment-aware deep link into QBO.
Badge wired into invoice list and invoice detail views.
Invoice detail actions: Sync now (enqueue single invoice + trigger immediate cycle) and View in QuickBooks.

Settings health panel in QboIntegrationSettings: last cycle result + timestamp, next run, pending-ops/exception/drift counts deep-linked to the inbox, token-expiry countdown, Sync Now button, auto-sync toggle.
i18n: new keys for badge states, health panel, and notifications in en + the 7 translated locales; pseudo-locales regenerated.
